html:
2026-0332
2026-04-16GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Ratifying the Final Acts of the Agreement between Canada and the European Union Amending Annex B of the Agreement on Civil Aviation Safety between Canada and the European Community.Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and the European Union Amending Annex B of the Agreement on Civil Aviation Safety between Canada and the European Community, done at Washington on 12 June 2024.N/A
subject: Order Ratifying the Final Acts of the Agreement between Canada and the European Union Amending Annex B of the Agreement on Civil Aviation Safety between Canada and the European Community.
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to bring into force for Canada the Agreement between Canada and the European Union Amending Annex B of the Agreement on Civil Aviation Safety between Canada and the European Community, done at Washington on 12 June 2024.
